arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Watford – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City begin their Carabao Cup campaign with a home clash against Watford in round three. The Citizens have won six of the last 11 editions of the League Cup and now stand at eight wins in this competition overall, with only Liverpool (10) having lifted the trophy on more occasions.
